verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum Domini, quod factum est ad Joël, filium Phatuel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּבַר־יְהֹוָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָיָ֔ה אֶל־יוֹאֵ֖ל בֶּן־פְּתוּאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: The word of the Lord that came to Joel the son of Pethuel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audite hoc, senes,  et auribus percipite, omnes habitatores terræ :  si factum est istud in diebus vestris,  aut in diebus patrum vestrorum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעוּ־זֹאת֙ הַזְּקֵנִ֔ים וְהַֽאֲזִ֔ינוּ כֹּ֖ל יוֹשְׁבֵ֣י הָאָ֑רֶץ הֶהָ֤יְתָה זֹּאת֙ בִּֽימֵיכֶ֔ם וְאִ֖ם בִּימֵ֥י אֲבֹתֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Hear this, ye old men, and give ear, all ye inhabitants of the land. Hath this been in your days, or even in the days of your fathers?

verses.latin_vulgate: Super hoc filiis vestris narrate,  et filii vestri filiis suis,  et filii eorum generationi alteræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָלֶ֖יהָ לִבְנֵיכֶ֣ם סַפֵּ֑רוּ וּבְנֵיכֶם֙ לִבְנֵיהֶ֔ם וּבְנֵיהֶ֖ם לְד֥וֹר אַחֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: Tell ye your children of it, and let your children tell their children, and their children another generation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Residuum erucæ comedit locusta,  et residuum locustæ comedit bruchus,  et residuum bruchi comedit rubigo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֶ֤תֶר הַגָּזָם֙ אָכַ֣ל הָאַרְבֶּ֔ה וְיֶ֥תֶר הָאַרְבֶּ֖ה אָכַ֣ל הַיָּ֑לֶק וְיֶ֣תֶר הַיֶּ֔לֶק אָכַ֖ל הֶחָסִֽיל׃
verses.king_james: That which the palmerworm hath left hath the locust eaten; and that which the locust hath left hath the cankerworm eaten; and that which the cankerworm hath left hath the caterpiller eaten.

verses.latin_vulgate: Expergiscimini, ebrii,  et flete et ululate, omnes qui bibitis vinum in dulcedine,  quoniam periit ab ore vestro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָקִ֤יצוּ שִׁכּוֹרִים֙ וּבְכ֔וּ וְהֵילִ֖לוּ כׇּל־שֹׁ֣תֵי יָ֑יִן עַל־עָסִ֕יס כִּ֥י נִכְרַ֖ת מִפִּיכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Awake, ye drunkards, and weep; and howl, all ye drinkers of wine, because of the new wine; for it is cut off from your mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gens enim ascendit super terram meam,  fortis et innumerabilis :  dentes ejus ut dentes leonis,  et molares ejus ut catuli leonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־גוֹי֙ עָלָ֣ה עַל־אַרְצִ֔י עָצ֖וּם וְאֵ֣ין מִסְפָּ֑ר שִׁנָּיו֙ שִׁנֵּ֣י אַרְיֵ֔ה וּֽמְתַלְּע֥וֹת לָבִ֖יא לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: For a nation is come up upon my land, strong, and without number, whose teeth are the teeth of a lion, and he hath the cheek teeth of a great lion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuit vineam meam in desertum,  et ficum meam decorticavit ;  nudans spoliavit eam, et projecit :  albi facti sunt rami ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂ֤ם גַּפְנִי֙ לְשַׁמָּ֔ה וּתְאֵנָתִ֖י לִקְצָפָ֑ה חָשֹׂ֤ף חֲשָׂפָהּ֙ וְהִשְׁלִ֔יךְ הִלְבִּ֖ינוּ שָׂרִיגֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: He hath laid my vine waste, and barked my fig tree: he hath made it clean bare, and cast it away; the branches thereof are made white.

verses.latin_vulgate: Plange quasi virgo accincta sacco super virum pubertatis suæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלִ֕י כִּבְתוּלָ֥ה חֲגֻרַת־שַׂ֖ק עַל־בַּ֥עַל נְעוּרֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Lament like a virgin girded with sackcloth for the husband of her youth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Periit sacrificium et libatio de domo Domini ;  luxerunt sacerdotes, ministri Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הׇכְרַ֥ת מִנְחָ֛ה וָנֶ֖סֶךְ מִבֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה אָֽבְלוּ֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים מְשָׁרְתֵ֖י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The meat offering and the drink offering is cut off from the house of the Lord; the priests, the Lord’s ministers, mourn.

verses.latin_vulgate: Depopulata est regio,  luxit humus,  quoniam devastatum est triticum,  confusum est vinum,  elanguit oleum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֻׁדַּ֣ד שָׂדֶ֔ה אָבְלָ֖ה אֲדָמָ֑ה כִּ֚י שֻׁדַּ֣ד דָּגָ֔ן הוֹבִ֥ישׁ תִּיר֖וֹשׁ אֻמְלַ֥ל יִצְהָֽר׃
verses.king_james: The field is wasted, the land mourneth; for the corn is wasted: the new wine is dried up, the oil languisheth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confusi sunt agricolæ,  ululaverunt vinitores  super frumento et hordeo,  quia periit messis agri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֹבִ֣ישׁוּ אִכָּרִ֗ים הֵילִ֙ילוּ֙ כֹּֽרְמִ֔ים עַל־חִטָּ֖ה וְעַל־שְׂעֹרָ֑ה כִּ֥י אָבַ֖ד קְצִ֥יר שָׂדֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: Be ye ashamed, O ye husbandmen; howl, O ye vinedressers, for the wheat and for the barley; because the harvest of the field is perished.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vinea confusa est,  et ficus elanguit ;  malogranatum, et palma, et malum,  et omnia ligna agri aruerunt,  quia confusum est gaudium a filiis hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַגֶּ֣פֶן הוֹבִ֔ישָׁה וְהַתְּאֵנָ֖ה אֻמְלָ֑לָה רִמּ֞וֹן גַּם־תָּמָ֣ר וְתַפּ֗וּחַ כׇּל־עֲצֵ֤י הַשָּׂדֶה֙ יָבֵ֔שׁוּ כִּי־הֹבִ֥ישׁ שָׂשׂ֖וֹן מִן־בְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The vine is dried up, and the fig tree languisheth; the pomegranate tree, the palm tree also, and the apple tree, even all the trees of the field, are withered: because joy is withered away from the sons of men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accingite vos, et plangite, sacerdotes :  ululate, ministri altaris ;  ingredimini, cubate in sacco, ministri Dei mei,  quoniam interiit de domo Dei vestri sacrificium et libatio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חִגְר֨וּ וְסִפְד֜וּ הַכֹּהֲנִ֗ים הֵילִ֙ילוּ֙ מְשָׁרְתֵ֣י מִזְבֵּ֔חַ בֹּ֚אוּ לִ֣ינוּ בַשַּׂקִּ֔ים מְשָׁרְתֵ֖י אֱלֹהָ֑י כִּ֥י נִמְנַ֛ע מִבֵּ֥ית אֱלֹהֵיכֶ֖ם מִנְחָ֥ה וָנָֽסֶךְ׃
verses.king_james: Gird yourselves, and lament, ye priests: howl, ye ministers of the altar: come, lie all night in sackcloth, ye ministers of my God: for the meat offering and the drink offering is withholden from the house of your God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sanctificate jejunium, vocate cœtum,  congregate senes, omnes habitatores terræ  in domum Dei vestri,  et clamate ad Dominum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קַדְּשׁוּ־צוֹם֙ קִרְא֣וּ עֲצָרָ֔ה אִסְפ֣וּ זְקֵנִ֗ים כֹּ֚ל יֹשְׁבֵ֣י הָאָ֔רֶץ בֵּ֖ית יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵיכֶ֑ם וְזַעֲק֖וּ אֶל־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Sanctify ye a fast, call a solemn assembly, gather the elders and all the inhabitants of the land into the house of the Lord your God, and cry unto the Lord,

verses.latin_vulgate: A, a, a, diei !  quia prope est dies Domini,  et quasi vastitas a potente veniet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲהָ֖הּ לַיּ֑וֹם כִּ֤י קָרוֹב֙ י֣וֹם יְהֹוָ֔ה וּכְשֹׁ֖ד מִשַּׁדַּ֥י יָבֽוֹא׃
verses.king_james: Alas for the day! for the day of the Lord is at hand, and as a destruction from the Almighty shall it come.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid non coram oculis vestris alimenta perierunt  de domo Dei nostri, lætitia et exsultatio ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲל֛וֹא נֶ֥גֶד עֵינֵ֖ינוּ אֹ֣כֶל נִכְרָ֑ת מִבֵּ֥ית אֱלֹהֵ֖ינוּ שִׂמְחָ֥ה וָגִֽיל׃
verses.king_james: Is not the meat cut off before our eyes, yea, joy and gladness from the house of our God?

verses.latin_vulgate: Computruerunt jumenta in stercore suo,  demolita sunt horrea,  dissipatæ sunt apothecæ,  quoniam confusum est triticum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָבְשׁ֣וּ פְרֻד֗וֹת תַּ֚חַת מֶגְרְפֹ֣תֵיהֶ֔ם נָשַׁ֙מּוּ֙ אֹֽצָר֔וֹת נֶהֶרְס֖וּ מַמְּגֻר֑וֹת כִּ֥י הֹבִ֖ישׁ דָּגָֽן׃
verses.king_james: The seed is rotten under their clods, the garners are laid desolate, the barns are broken down; for the corn is withered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid ingemuit animal,  mugierunt greges armenti ?  quia non est pascua eis ;  sed et greges pecorum disperierunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־נֶּאֶנְחָ֣ה בְהֵמָ֗ה נָבֹ֙כוּ֙ עֶדְרֵ֣י בָקָ֔ר כִּ֛י אֵ֥ין מִרְעֶ֖ה לָהֶ֑ם גַּם־עֶדְרֵ֥י הַצֹּ֖אן נֶאְשָֽׁמוּ׃
verses.king_james: How do the beasts groan! the herds of cattle are perplexed, because they have no pasture; yea, the flocks of sheep are made desolate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad te, Domine, clamabo,  quia ignis comedit speciosa deserti,  et flamma succendit omnia ligna regionis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵלֶ֥יךָ יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶקְרָ֑א כִּ֣י אֵ֗שׁ אָֽכְלָה֙ נְא֣וֹת מִדְבָּ֔ר וְלֶ֣הָבָ֔ה לִהֲטָ֖ה כׇּל־עֲצֵ֥י הַשָּׂדֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: O Lord, to thee will I cry: for the fire hath devoured the pastures of the wilderness, and the flame hath burned all the trees of the field.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et bestiæ agri, quasi area sitiens imbrem, suspexerunt ad te,  quoniam exsiccati sunt fontes aquarum,  et ignis devoravit speciosa deserti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־בַּהֲמ֥וֹת שָׂדֶ֖ה תַּעֲר֣וֹג אֵלֶ֑יךָ כִּ֤י יָֽבְשׁוּ֙ אֲפִ֣יקֵי מָ֔יִם וְאֵ֕שׁ אָכְלָ֖ה נְא֥וֹת הַמִּדְבָּֽר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The beasts of the field cry also unto thee: for the rivers of waters are dried up, and the fire hath devoured the pastures of the wilderness.
